mapper.select: SELECT sum( `total_deposit_amount` ) AS total_deposit_amount, sum( `total_deposit_num` ) AS total_deposit_num, sum( `total_withdraw_amount` ) AS total_withdraw_amount, sum( `total_withdraw_num` ) AS total_withdraw_num, sum( `diff_deposit_withdraw` ) AS diff_deposit_withdraw, sum( `agent_subordinates_amount` ) AS agent_subordinates_amount, sum( `agent_subordinates_user` ) AS agent_subordinates_user, sum( `agent_subordinates_count` ) AS agent_subordinates_count, sum( `agent_transfer_amount` ) AS agent_transfer_amount, sum( `agent_transfer_user` ) AS agent_transfer_user, sum( `agent_transfer_count` ) AS agent_transfer_count from report_agent_deposit_withdraw ${ew.customSqlSegment}
mapper.update:
update report_agent_deposit_withdraw set currency_code=#{currencyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total_deposit_amount = total_deposit_amount + #{totalDepositAmount},
total_deposit_num = total_deposit_num + #{totalDepositNum},
total_withdraw_amount = total_withdraw_amount + #{totalWithdrawAmount},
total_withdraw_num = total_withdraw_num + #{totalWithdrawNum},
diff_deposit_withdraw= total_deposit_amount + #{totalDepositAmount}-total_withdraw_amount-#{totalWithdrawAmount},
agent_subordinates_amount = agent_subordinates_amount + #{agentSubordinatesAmount},
agent_subordinates_count = agent_subordinates_count + #{agentSubordinatesCount},
agent_subordinates_user = #{agentSubordinatesUser},
agent_transfer_amount = agent_transfer_amount + #{agentTransferAmount},
agent_transfer_count = agent_transfer_count + #{agentTransferCount},
agent_transfer_user = #{agentTransferUser},
updated_time=#{updatedTime} where id =#{id}
